data.label: Calculated from declared datetime
data.description: Fact computed at the declared birth instant; accuracy depends on user-provided time.

data.label: Stable across uncertainty window
data.description: Single zodiac sign observed across all samples in the uncertainty window.

data.label: Ambiguous across uncertainty window
data.description: Multiple possible signs within the uncertainty window.

data.label: Reference based
data.description: Indicative projection at reference time; not an exact interpretive fact by default.

data.label: Excluded missing input
data.description: Fact not computable due to insufficient input.
